components.component_notes: Official Arthrex portfolio sources describe the broader FiberStitch meniscal repair workflow family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: This is a portfolio-level row rather than a single meniscal repair instrumentation tray, so no dedicated tray is asserted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: Tray detail should only be added from narrower FiberStitch device or procedure-specific sources.
